steps.t: The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should examine the fully restored throne.
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
Prince Ingór can be found at Vérnozal in Máttugard. You should talk to Prince Ingór.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should return to the Throne of Zidir-nesad.
Prince Ingór can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Prince Ingór.
The Steepset can be found in Máttugard. You should <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> out over Máttugard at Steepset.
The Steepset can be found in Máttugard. You should <rgb=#FF0000>listen</rgb> to the sounds of Máttugard at the Steepset.
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
